description: Claude-Code-only hooks (kept out of hooks/hooks.json, which Grok also auto-discovers and whose hook-event schema we cannot verify tolerates unrecognized keys like Stop). Referenced explicitly via the top-level "hooks" field in .claude-plugin/plugin.json, which replaces default hooks/hooks.json auto-discovery for Claude Code — so this file must be self-contained (it repeats SessionStart activation rather than relying on hooks/hooks.json, which Claude Code will no longer read once this field is set).

hooks.statusMessage: Checking figures against ledger kernel proof...
